hero.headline: Control Plane for AI-Powered Development
hero.subheadline: Govern Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot — Sprint Planning Governance, Team Management, full Planning Hierarchy. From Roadmap to Backlog.

gateEngine.title: Quality Gates
gateEngine.description: 4-gate quality pipeline (G0-G3) with OPA policies. Dual-track: Feature Gates + Sprint Gates.

evidenceVault.title: Evidence Vault
evidenceVault.description: SHA256 hashed artifacts. 8-state lifecycle. Full audit trail for compliance.

aiContext.title: AI Context Engine
aiContext.description: Stage-aware prompts for Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot. Reduce feature waste 60%→30%.

policyGuards.title: Policy Guards
policyGuards.description: Semgrep SAST + AI-specific security rules. OWASP ASVS Level 2 compliant.

sprintGovernance.title: Sprint Governance
sprintGovernance.description: G-Sprint and G-Sprint-Close gates. 24h documentation enforcement. Planning Hierarchy: Roadmap → Phase → Sprint → Backlog.

teamManagement.title: Team Management
teamManagement.description: Personal and Organization teams. Role-based access (Owner, Admin, Member). Invite via email with secure tokens.

step2.title: Configure
step2.description: Choose the right policies and gates.

step3.title: Ship
step3.description: AI validates every PR. Full audit trail.

vietnamFounders.title: For Vietnam Founders
vietnamFounders.heading: AI Code Generation
vietnamFounders.subtitle: IR-based Codegen - From idea to first product
vietnamFounders.description: You don't need Cursor or Claude Code. AI Code Generation is built into the platform, helping you build your first product in ~30 minutes* with full audit trail.
vietnamFounders.disclaimer: *Typical for simple CRUD apps. Time varies by project scope.

features.compliance: VN regulatory compliance (BHXH, VAT, Labor Law)

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the pilot program

q1.question: Who can join the pilot program?
q1.answer: Vietnamese SME founders and technical leaders in F&B, Hospitality, or Retail industries. We're looking for teams ready to integrate AI governance into their development workflow.

q2.question: How long does the pilot last?
q2.answer: The pilot runs for 6 weeks with weekly check-ins. You'll work closely with our team to implement SDLC Orchestrator and provide feedback.

q3.question: What's the time commitment?
q3.answer: Approximately 2 hours per week: 1 hour for onboarding/training sessions and 1 hour for integration with your existing workflow.

q4.question: Is it really free?
q4.answer: Yes! The pilot program is completely free. You'll get full access to all features, dedicated support, and a 50% lifetime discount after the pilot ends.

q5.question: What happens after the pilot?
q5.answer: Pilot participants receive 50% off for life, priority support, early access to new features, and a voice in our product roadmap. You're also part of our founder community.
